message:
refactor(cli): tighten dead_code annotations on CliError and TuningRisk

Move #[allow(dead_code)] from type-level to the specific unused items:
CliError::Internal (variant) and TuningRisk::High (variant). All other
variants are actively used (User=21, Runtime=78, Partial=6 call sites).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
